description: Perform a Double Multiple Streamtube (DMS) simulation on the loaded Vertical Axis Wind Turbine (VAWT) project in QBlade. Configure the simulation for the current rotor using a Tip Speed Ratio (TSR) range from 1 to 8 with a delta of 0.5. After running the simulation, verify the Power Coefficient (Cp) vs TSR curve is plotted and save the project to /home/ga/Documents/projects/vawt_dms_result.wpa.
